title: Invisible Itemframes
description: Give survival players access to invisible itemframes.
body:
# Invisible Itemframes
Gives survival players access to invisible item frames.

## Usage
Shift click the item frame with an item to have it become invisible.

## Gamerules
The mod adds the gamerule ``onInvisibleItemFramePop`` for modifying what to do when an item is taken out of an invisible item frame. It can have 3 values:

- Reveal (default)
- - makes the item frame visible again after taking out an item.
- Destroy
- - breaks the item frame when an item is taken out, dropping it on the ground.
- Nothing
- - not recommended, leaves the item frame entity there when taking out the items
